## Documentation Freshness Audit — 2026-03-26

**Generated by:** /doc-superpowers audit
**Branch:** main
**Repo HEAD:** 0c8e907

### Summary
- Scanned: 12 docs across 4 scopes (architecture, workflows, guides, specs)
- Fresh: 2 | Stale: 10 | Missing coverage: 0 | Untracked: 3

### P0 Critical
None.

### P1 Stale

1. `docs/architecture/system-overview.md` — Action Router omits `release` action
   - Doc says: `"Routes to init/audit/review-pr/update/diagram/sync/hooks/spec-generate/spec-inject/spec-verify based on user input"` (10 actions)
   - Code shows: SKILL.md lists 11 actions including `release`
   - Suggested fix: Add `release` to the Action Router container description

2. `docs/architecture/system-overview.md` — Git relationship missing release tag management
   - Doc says: `Rel(skill, git, "Staleness detection, freshness markers")`
   - Code shows: `release` action uses `git log <tag>..HEAD`, `git tag vX.Y.Z`, and tag backfill
   - Suggested fix: Update Rel to include `"Staleness detection, freshness markers, release tag management"`

3. `docs/workflows/doc-superpowers.md` — Audit process missing CLAUDE.md, README.md, RELEASE-NOTES.md currency checks (SKILL.md steps 6-8)
   - Doc says: Steps jump from "Validate naming conventions" directly to "dispatch scope agent"
   - Code shows: SKILL.md audit steps 6-8 explicitly check CLAUDE.md currency, README.md currency, and RELEASE-NOTES.md currency before dispatching agents
   - Suggested fix: Add three currency check steps between current steps 4 and 5; update merge step to include these findings

4. `docs/workflows/doc-superpowers.md` — Init process missing README.md sync (SKILL.md step 9)
   - Doc says: Step 6 is "Update or create CLAUDE.md" with no README.md step; init flowchart has no README.md node
   - Code shows: SKILL.md init step 9: "Sync README.md — If README.md exists, update feature list, action list, and usage examples"
   - Suggested fix: Add "Sync README.md" step after "Update CLAUDE.md"; add node to init flowchart

5. `docs/workflows/doc-superpowers.md` — Review-pr process missing CLAUDE.md and README.md impact checks (SKILL.md steps 6-7)
   - Doc says: 5 steps total, no mention of CLAUDE.md or README.md impact
   - Code shows: SKILL.md review-pr steps 6-7 check CLAUDE.md and README.md impact
   - Suggested fix: Add CLAUDE.md and README.md impact check steps

6. `docs/workflows/doc-superpowers.md` — Update process missing CLAUDE.md sync (step 4) and README.md sync (step 5)
   - Doc says: No CLAUDE.md or README.md sync steps after scope agent dispatch
   - Code shows: SKILL.md update steps 4-5 explicitly sync CLAUDE.md and README.md after doc changes
   - Suggested fix: Add explicit sync steps

7. `docs/workflows/doc-superpowers.md` — Sync process missing CLAUDE.md currency (step 6) and README.md currency (step 7)
   - Doc says: 6 steps, ending at hooks status
   - Code shows: SKILL.md sync steps 6-7 check CLAUDE.md and README.md currency before hooks status (step 8)
   - Suggested fix: Add currency check steps

8. `docs/codebase-guide.md` — Says "10 action handlers" but SKILL.md has 11 (missing `release`)
   - Doc says: `"Core skill logic: discovery phase, 10 action handlers (init, audit, review-pr, update, diagram, sync, hooks, spec-generate, spec-inject, spec-verify)"`
   - Code shows: SKILL.md line 54: `Actions: init | audit | review-pr | update | diagram | sync | hooks | release | spec-generate | spec-inject | spec-verify`
   - Suggested fix: Change to "11 action handlers" and add `release` to the list; add release flow to Code Flow section

9. `docs/conventions.md` — No mention of `release` action or its conventions (commit prefix mapping, tag format, RELEASE-NOTES.md entry format)
   - Doc says: Only mention of "release" is `main -- stable releases` (branch naming)
   - Code shows: SKILL.md defines full `release` action with 8 steps, conventional commit parsing, and `vX.Y.Z` tag format
   - Suggested fix: Add "Release Conventions" section

10. `docs/conventions.md` — No mention of CLAUDE.md/README.md sync obligation for write actions
    - Doc says: No occurrence of "CLAUDE.md" or "README.md" as sync targets
    - Code shows: SKILL.md Common Mistakes: "Every write action (init, update, sync, release, spec-generate) must sync CLAUDE.md" and same for README.md
    - Suggested fix: Add "Cross-Cutting Sync" section documenting the obligation

11. `docs/guides/getting-started.md` — `release` action missing from "All Available Commands" table
    - Doc says: 12 command entries, no `release`
    - Code shows: SKILL.md Quick Reference and README.md both list `release` with `--from=<ref>` option
    - Suggested fix: Add `| /doc-superpowers release [--from=<ref>] | Draft release notes entry from git history |`

12. `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-14-spec-lifecycle-protocol-design.md` — Design doc missing `spec-generate` steps 10-11 (CLAUDE.md and README.md sync)
    - Doc says: spec-generate has 7 steps, ending at "Link back to design doc"
    - Code shows: `references/spec-lifecycle-actions.md` has 12 steps including Step 10 (Sync CLAUDE.md) and Step 11 (Sync README.md)
    - Suggested fix: Add steps 10-11 or annotate that authoritative procedure is in `references/spec-lifecycle-actions.md`

13. `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-14-spec-lifecycle-protocol-design.md` — spec-verify post-execute describes three-way check but code ref has five-way
    - Doc says: Coverage check has 3 axes: Design doc→Specs, Specs→Code, Code→Specs
    - Code shows: `references/spec-lifecycle-actions.md` adds CLAUDE.md→Filesystem and README.md→Capabilities checks
    - Suggested fix: Update to five-way coverage check

14. `README.md` — `audit` action description understates scope
    - Doc says: `"Check all docs for staleness"`
    - Code shows: SKILL.md audit also checks CLAUDE.md, README.md, and RELEASE-NOTES.md currency (steps 6-8)
    - Suggested fix: Update to "Check all docs, CLAUDE.md, README.md, and RELEASE-NOTES.md for staleness"

15. `README.md` — `review-pr` action description understates scope
    - Doc says: `"Check docs affected by PR changes"`
    - Code shows: SKILL.md review-pr steps 6-7 also check CLAUDE.md and README.md impact
    - Suggested fix: Update to "Check docs, CLAUDE.md, and README.md affected by PR changes"

16. `README.md` — `sync` action description understates scope
    - Doc says: `"Sync doc index with filesystem"`
    - Code shows: SKILL.md sync steps 6-7 also check CLAUDE.md and README.md currency
    - Suggested fix: Update to "Sync doc index with filesystem, check CLAUDE.md and README.md currency"

### P2 Incomplete

    - Code shows: Release management and cross-cutting CLAUDE.md/README.md sync are significant capabilities not mentioned

    - Suggested fix: Add key decision entry

19. `docs/architecture/system-overview.md` — Tech Stack table missing release management row
    - Doc says: 17 tech stack rows, no release management
    - Code shows: Release action uses git tags, conventional commits, and agent-assisted drafting
    - Suggested fix: Add row for release management

20. `docs/workflows/doc-superpowers.md` — Discovery boundary says `release` "does not use discovery" but SKILL.md says "No action skips discovery"
    - Doc says: `"release → analyzes git history, not documentation scopes"`
    - Code shows: SKILL.md line 81: `"Discovery is universal — all actions run discovery as their first step. No action skips discovery."` But release steps never mention discovery.
    - Suggested fix: Resolve SKILL.md contradiction first — either add discovery to release or qualify the universal statement

21. `docs/workflows/doc-superpowers.md` — Release step 3 omits `docs:→PATCH` and unmapped prefix default
    - Doc says: `"Auto-suggest version bump from conventional commit prefixes (feat→MINOR, fix→PATCH, BREAKING→MAJOR)"`
    - Code shows: SKILL.md also maps `docs:→PATCH` and defaults unmapped prefixes to PATCH
    - Suggested fix: Expand to include full mapping

22. `docs/codebase-guide.md` — "Where to Find Things" table missing README.md update rules row

23. `docs/conventions.md` — Discovery-First exception list only mentions `hooks` but `release` also has no explicit discovery step
    - Doc says: `"Every action runs the discovery phase before doing work (except hooks, which is a scaffolding command)."`
    - Code shows: SKILL.md release action's 8 steps never mention running discovery

### RELEASE-NOTES.md Status
- [ ] 2 commits unreleased since v2.3.0 (2026-03-25): `0c8e907 fix:`, `cff7b3d fix:`. Run `/doc-superpowers release` to draft a new version entry.
- Note: v2.3.0 has no git tag (only v1.0.0 exists). Consider backfilling tags for v2.1.0–v2.3.0.

### Actions
- Run `/doc-superpowers update` to generate fixes
- Run `doc-tools.sh update-index <doc>` after manual review
- If CLAUDE.md flagged stale above, update it per `references/doc-spec.md` CLAUDE.md update rules
- If README.md flagged stale above, update it per `references/doc-spec.md` README.md update rules
- If RELEASE-NOTES.md flagged stale above, run `/doc-superpowers release` to draft a new version entry
